reviews.review_description: I was ready to be the undertaker and ready to be John wick try to be Mike Tyson checking version it stopped me of every being undertaker John wick and Mike Tyson I'm sad very sad so one star fix it please

I was ready to be mike Tyson until i got stuck in "checking version..." and after that happened it said it sad check your internet and try again and i did 12 times and it wont work me cant be no mike tyson😭😭
Downloaded the game but wouldn’t load. It got stuck on a “loading version” screen that I couldn’t get past.
I sat in the screen where it says like loading but never loaded i sat there for 5 min but never loaded
I tried to join the game but it takes so long and then it says plz disconnected please check your internet even though my internet is on

I played it because of the name and I laughed and knew I had to record myself playing it just because I thought it was fun and it was for the most part you see it’s very Gorilla Tag like in it’s play style and if you want that sure just fix it somewhat as the movement feels a bit janky and I think there might be a way to fix that however if you want to go down a different way maybe change it so the player can move around freely but the main criticism I have for this game is that there’s barely anyone on the game at least when I played it because every game I loaded into there was nobody in the game this could be fixed by marketing the game so more people could play it but yeah this game has a lot of potential

reviews.review_title: literally no one is in the servers
reviews.review_description: every single game mode i joined there was no one like absolutely no one like it seems like a good game but there's just no one in the game

I just wanted to take my anger out on some clankers and this gave me exactly what i wanted and alotbif the other comments saying its bad dont understand what early access means so please just send bugs in the discord and theyll most likely fix it
Barely seen anyone in lobby's, but still a good game.

Don’t listen to anyone saying Oh ThIS GaMe is TrAsH!! This game is a hidden gem it just needs some tweaks and it will be the best vr multiplayer shooter ever 5/5 ps can you try and fix private  and loading into a game and please add a shotgun ￼

developer_response.body: Appreciate the support and a shotgun is on the way for the next big update! Also private rooms work and are a little bit complicated but we are working towards making them user friendly, appreciate the feedback.

reviews.review_description: Every time i go into a matech there's nobody an the movement is like any gorrila tag game
no community
So I've just gotten this game and looked at the images, game looks fun right? Wrong, the loading screen freezes on me but i can hear the background noise??

developer_response.body: Yes we are fixing it. The server rooms sometimes like to close off which disallows players to join.

reviews.review_title: baby gorilla tag game for babies
reviews.review_description: I am not a baby I wanted a fast paced arena shooter with clankers! (I should've probably watched the trailer)

developer_response.body: please comment bugs but maybe we will take it into consideration for a future update or game release for a non platformer movement game

reviews.review_description: Clankers is a great game! My only complaints are that it doesn't have the most active playerbase, but there's not much the owner can do about that.
i just don't see that much players but i still like this game i'll play it
It doesnt load but heard its good game so 2 stars
I have seen no players so far but the game seems very fun just don’t put ppl in empty lobbies
